message:
fix(proptest): remove unused imports/strategies in recorder lexical proptests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Clean up compiler warnings: remove unused LexicalFieldHandles import
from schema tests, and remove unused arb_event_id/arb_text/arb_document_fields
strategies plus unused imports from ingest tests.
